## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for SEO and GEO Lead role at GrowthX, discussing company operations, role responsibilities, and candidate experience.](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a growth agency (60+ clients) with an internal AI-powered platform for content marketing and SEO/GEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Role involves owning SEO/GEO strategy for all clients, defining best practices, and scaling operations](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Mahmoud has extensive SEO experience, including work with Fortune 500 companies and adapting to LLM/AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Growth agency with 60+ B2B startup/tech clients](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Internal AI-powered platform for content marketing and SEO/GEO](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Agency model with goal to create a platform for knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [\~70 employees: 20 engineering/design/product, 40-50 client services](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=3037.0)

### SEO/GEO Lead Role

  - [Own SEO and GEO strategy for all 60+ clients](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Define best practices and create systems that scale](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Develop roadmap for tracking and adjusting strategies](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Balance deep client work with meta-layer improvements for all teams](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

### Mahmoud's Experience

  - [10+ years in SEO, starting with startups and personal projects](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Worked at AKDM (2018-2021) servicing Chase.com and other clients](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Currently at Conductor (2021-present), handling 30+ Fortune 500 clients](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [Adapted to LLM/AI shift, focusing on Android Engine Optimization](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### SEO/GEO Strategy Insights

  - [Tracking brand mentions, citations, and sentiment in LLM results](https://fathom.video/share/2pZz2jdjGs4H_fFvAxZFMBDD7YoLB972?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
